    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DISCORD_LINK
    "https://discord.gg/BwSuTdEGJ4"
    public static final String
    GITHUB_LINK
    "https://github.com/xLorey/FluxLoader-PZ"
    public static final String
    PATH_FLUXLOADER_LOGO
    "io/xlorey/FluxLoader/media/FluxLoader-Logo.png"
    public static final String
    PATH_TO_GAME_CLASS_FOLDER
    "zombie"
    public static final String
    PLUGINS_FOLDER_NAME
    "plugins"
